category_sources: Official SourceForge project categorizes Tgif under Presentation, Vector Graphics, and Drawing.
source_facts.description says it is an Xlib-based interactive 2D drawing tool.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title is Tgif - a vector-based 2D drawing tool.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page links Summary, Files, Support, Mailing Lists, News, and Discussion; no dedicated modern docs surface was found.
source_facts.homepage points to the official SourceForge project page.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page exposes release files and project resources, but no official source-control repository URL was identified; SourceForge project page itself is not a source-control URL.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project lists Vector Graphics, Drawing, Presentation, X Window System, and C.
source_facts.description identifies an Xlib-based 2D drawing tool.
